pageContext.name: Elvis Presley (Jailhouse Rock Edition)
pageContext.description: Some people tap their feet, some people snap their fingers, and some people sway back and forth. I just sorta do 'em all together, I guess.   Sideshow and Iconiq Studios are honored to present the third entry in the 1/6th scale Legends Series, the King of Rock and Roll himself: Elvis Presley (Jailhouse Rock Edition).  This fully black-and-white figure includes two authentic hand-sculpted heads that perfectly capture The King from the unforgettable Jailhouse Rock video, a fully articulated body capable of recreating his iconic moves, and more.
